articles.author: Joseph Zucker
articles.title: Caitlin Clark, Angel Reese's Final Box Score Stats, Highlights as Fever Beat Dream - Bleacher Report
articles.description: The Indiana Fever are back in the win column thanks to an 83-71 victory over the Atlanta Dream on Thursday.
articles.content:
The Indiana Fever are back in the win column thanks to an 83-71 victory over the Atlanta Dream on Thursday.
